info.description:
Generic SNAP/ASPI-compliant payment gateway API: B2B access
token issuance, admin client onboarding, signature-generation
utilities, and Virtual Account (transfer-VA) transaction and
merchant-dashboard endpoints.
info.title: SNAP Payment Integration Gateway API

post.description: Creates a new client_app trust-anchor record and, if publicKeyPem is supplied, its first client_key in the same call. State-changing: creates persistent client onboarding records.

400.description: Invalid payload, missing clientId/clientName/keyId, or invalid publicKeyPem

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing X-Admin-API-Key header

post.description: Registers an additional active public key for an existing client (e.g. key rotation). State-changing: creates a persistent client_key record.

400.description: Missing clientId, missing keyId/publicKeyPem, or invalid publicKeyPem

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing X-Admin-API-Key header

delete.description: Revokes (deactivates) a client's public key so it can no longer be used to verify signatures. State-changing: updates a persistent client_key record.

400.description: Missing clientId or keyId path parameters

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing X-Admin-API-Key header

post.description: Generates the SHA256withRSA signature required as X-SIGNATURE when calling POST /openapi/v1.0/access-token/b2b.

parameters.description: RSA private key (PEM) used to sign the string-to-sign
parameters.name: Private_Key

post.description: Generates the HMAC-SHA512 signature required as X-SIGNATURE when calling SNAP-protected transaction endpoints (transfer-VA, merchant VA dashboard) with an issued access token.

parameters.description: Client secret shared with the partner
parameters.name: X-CLIENT-SECRET

parameters.description: HTTP method of the target request, e.g. POST
parameters.name: HttpMethod

parameters.description: Relative path of the target request, e.g. /openapi/v1.0/transfer-va/inquiry
parameters.name: EndpointUrl

parameters.description: Bearer access token issued by POST /openapi/v1.0/access-token/b2b
parameters.name: AccessToken

parameters.description: Raw request body of the target request, used verbatim in the string-to-sign
parameters.name: request

get.description: Returns 200 with a static status payload if the service process is up. Does not check downstream dependencies (DB/Redis).

post.description: Issues a bearer access token for a registered client, after verifying the asymmetric X-SIGNATURE against the client's registered public key. This endpoint ISSUES the token — the caller has no prior bearer token; auth is via the X-CLIENT-KEY/X-TIMESTAMP/X-SIGNATURE headers only. Use POST /api/v1/utilities/signature-auth to compute X-SIGNATURE.
post.summary: Issue a SNAP B2B access token

parameters.description: Unique key for this request; enforced by IdempotencyMiddleware for all non-GET requests on this route. A repeated key with an identical payload replays the cached response; a repeated key with a different payload is rejected with 422.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

400.description: Invalid request payload, missing required SNAP headers, or missing Idempotency-Key

409.description: Conflict: request already in progress for this Idempotency-Key

422.description: Idempotency-Key reused with a different payload

post.description:
Merchant-initiated upsert of a Virtual Account (ASPI VAUpsertRequest). This performs a real state-changing action: it creates or updates a persistent Virtual Account record.
To register a payment-notification callback URL, set additionalInfo.dbUrlProcess (e.g. {"additionalInfo": {"dbUrlProcess": "https://merchant.example.com/webhook/payment-callback"}}) — per ASPI's VAUpsertRequest, this is the only defined key under additionalInfo; it is not a top-level request field.
post.summary: Create or update a Virtual Account

parameters.description: Unique external ID for this request
parameters.name: X-EXTERNAL-ID

parameters.description: Unique key for this request; enforced by IdempotencyMiddleware. A repeated key with an identical payload replays the cached response; a repeated key with a different payload is rejected with 422.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

parameters.description: VA create/update request. additionalInfo.dbUrlProcess carries the merchant payment-callback URL (see description).
parameters.name: request

200.description: additionalInfo.dbUrlProcess is echoed back in virtualAccountData.additionalInfo

400.description: Invalid Field Format / Invalid Mandatory Field / missing Idempotency-Key

409.description: Conflict: request already in progress for this Idempotency-Key

422.description: Idempotency-Key reused with a different payload

delete.description: Merchant-initiated deletion of a Virtual Account (ASPI DeleteVARequest). This performs a real state-changing action: it permanently removes/deactivates the Virtual Account record.

parameters.description: Unique external ID for this request
parameters.name: X-EXTERNAL-ID

parameters.description: Unique key for this request; enforced by IdempotencyMiddleware. A repeated key with an identical payload replays the cached response; a repeated key with a different payload is rejected with 422.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

400.description: Invalid Field Format / Invalid Mandatory Field / missing Idempotency-Key

409.description: Conflict: request already in progress for this Idempotency-Key

422.description: Idempotency-Key reused with a different payload

post.description: Vendor-initiated inquiry for Virtual Account bill/customer details prior to payment. Read-only.

parameters.description: Unique external ID for this request
parameters.name: X-EXTERNAL-ID

parameters.description: Unique key for this request; enforced by IdempotencyMiddleware. A repeated key with an identical payload replays the cached response; a repeated key with a different payload is rejected with 422.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

400.description: Invalid Field Format / Invalid Mandatory Field / missing Idempotency-Key

409.description: Conflict: request already in progress for this Idempotency-Key

422.description: Idempotency-Key reused with a different payload

post.description: Merchant-initiated paginated listing of Virtual Account transactions, filterable by date range, status and VA number. Read-only.

parameters.description: Unique external ID for this request
parameters.name: X-EXTERNAL-ID

parameters.description: Unique key for this request; enforced by IdempotencyMiddleware since ListVA is called via POST. A repeated key with an identical payload replays the cached response; a repeated key with a different payload is rejected with 422.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

409.description: Conflict: request already in progress for this Idempotency-Key

422.description: Idempotency-Key reused with a different payload

post.description: Vendor-initiated notification that a payment against a Virtual Account has been received. State-changing: records the payment.

parameters.description: Unique external ID for this request
parameters.name: X-EXTERNAL-ID

parameters.description: Unique key for this request; enforced by IdempotencyMiddleware. A repeated key with an identical payload replays the cached response; a repeated key with a different payload is rejected with 422.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

400.description: Invalid Field Format / Invalid Mandatory Field / missing Idempotency-Key

409.description: Conflict (mapped from downstream error, or in-flight request with same Idempotency-Key)

422.description: Idempotency-Key reused with a different payload

post.description: Vendor-initiated inquiry of the current payment status of a Virtual Account transaction. Read-only.

parameters.description: Unique external ID for this request
parameters.name: X-EXTERNAL-ID

parameters.description: Unique key for this request; enforced by IdempotencyMiddleware. A repeated key with an identical payload replays the cached response; a repeated key with a different payload is rejected with 422.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

400.description: Invalid Field Format / Invalid Mandatory Field / missing Idempotency-Key

409.description: Conflict: request already in progress for this Idempotency-Key

422.description: Idempotency-Key reused with a different payload

additionalInfo.description:
AdditionalInfo carries proprietary extensions per ASPI VAUpsertRequest's
additionalInfo.dbUrlProcess slot (aspi-open-api-va.yaml:317-320) — the
merchant payment callback URL is passed here as additionalInfo.dbUrlProcess,
not as a top-level field (there is no such field in the spec).

AdditionalInfo echoes back additionalInfo.dbUrlProcess per ASPI
VAUpsertResponse (aspi-open-api-va.yaml:348-351).

AdminToken.description: Static admin API key configured via the ADMIN_API_KEY environment variable. Required for all /admin/* endpoints.
AdminToken.name: X-Admin-API-Key

BearerAuth.description: Bearer access token issued by POST /openapi/v1.0/access-token/b2b, e.g. "Bearer <token>".
BearerAuth.name: Authorization

SnapClientKey.description: Client identifier issued by the admin during onboarding. Required on the B2B access-token endpoint.
SnapClientKey.name: X-CLIENT-KEY

SnapSignature.description: Request signature. Compute via POST /api/v1/utilities/signature-auth (asymmetric, access-token endpoint) or POST /api/v1/utilities/signature-service (symmetric, transaction endpoints).
SnapSignature.name: X-SIGNATURE
